text:
Congratulations on your new companion. This is genuinely one of the better decisions a person can make.

Here is what to expect: the first few days will involve adjustment on both sides. Your new pet is learning your rhythms, your sounds, your smell. Give them space when they need it and presence when they seek it. The balance reveals itself quickly.

What you are signing up for is straightforward. Regular feeding, consistent routines, veterinary care, attention. In return you get loyalty that does not waver based on your mood or your productivity or whether you remembered to text back. Pets do not keep score.

There will be a moment, probably within the first week, where they settle beside you or look at you with complete ease, and you will understand why people do this. It is not complicated to explain. You will have a small life depending on you, and that turns out to feel mostly like a gift.

Take good care of them. They will take care of you right back.
